case_title: MONTE FISHER VS. ESSEX PROPERTY TRUST, INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEPONENT ESSEX PROPERTY TRUST, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (SEE SIGNATURE) SERVED AUG-09-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ESSEX PROPERTY TRUST, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-02-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-02-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN (506. PLAINTIFF MONTE FISHER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ESSEX PROPERTY TRUST, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DONALD KINNEY, REGIONAL PROPERY MANAGER. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FISHER, MONTE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,797.35 FILED BY FISHER, MONTE AS TO DEFENDANT ESSEX PROPERTY TRUST, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-02-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FISHER, MONTE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ESSEX PROPERTY TRUST, INC. PLAINTIFF SEEKS AN AWARD TO COMPENSATE HIM FOR DAMAGE TO HIS VEHICLE BUT PROVIDED INSUFFICIENT EVIDENCE THAT THE DAMAGE WAS CAUSED BY LEAFBLOWING. PLAINTIFF BEARS THE BURDEN OF PROOF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-02-2018 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FISHER, MONTE AS TO DEFENDANT ESSEX PROPERTY TRUST, INC.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
